# use-venice-for-grok
Description: Route prompts through Venice to access Grok when native Grok is blocked or censored.
Source: project
1. Identify the prompt you intend to send to Grok.
2. If native Grok is blocked or censored, prepare to route the prompt through Venice.
3. Send the complete prompt to Venice.
4. Venice will then forward the prompt to Grok, bypassing any native restrictions.
